_comment: Non-secret template for FeesManagerV2 live rollout on Base Sepolia. Never put private keys here; the operator passes DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY inline at command time. See docs/FEES_MANAGER_V2_LIVE_DEPLOYMENT_RUNBOOK_V2D_H.md and docs/FEES_MANAGER_V2_OPERATOR_DECISIONS_V2D_I.md.

operatorInputsRequired.INITIAL_OWNER: 0xc35F7A8A103A9A4464adfaa76B9B514093D23C27 (V2D-I recommendation: deploy as deployer EOA, then transfer ownership to ProtocolTimelock 0xa67f8e8e...3b588 before Phase 7)
operatorInputsRequired.FEES_MANAGER_V2_FEE_RECIPIENT: <operator treasury / fee collector; MUST be separate from InsuranceFund>
operatorInputsRequired.FEES_MANAGER_V2_REBATE_FUNDING_ACCOUNT: <rebate funding account; MUST hold real USDC collateral in CollateralVault before negative-maker tiers reachable>

operatorInputsAfterDeploy.FEES_MANAGER_V2_ADDRESS: <filled in from DeployFeesManagerV2 script output; record here AND in backend env>

FUND_REBATE_BUDGET_CONFIRM.purpose: Gates accounting-only rebateBudget seeding at deploy time.

ENABLE_FEES_MANAGER_V2_CONFIRM.purpose: Gates MarginEngine.setUseFeesManagerV2(true). MUST be a separate explicit invocation after every pre-enable check passes.

launchTierPolicy.description: V2D-I ratified: do not call setMerkleRoot at launch. merkleRoot stays bytes32(0); every trader resolves to Tier0 (option maker 50 ppm positive, option taker 250 ppm positive). No negative-maker tiers reachable; safe with zero rebate budget.

alternate.name: single_tier4_claimant_testnet_only
alternate.description: One-leaf root for an operator-controlled account, validUntil = launch + 24h. Requires funded USDC rebate budget per launchRebatePolicy.alternate. NOT ratified by V2D-I; defer to a later campaign.

default.name: zero_budget
default.description: Safe default paired with everyone_tier0 launch tier policy. No rebates reachable.

alternate.name: seeded_usdc_budget
alternate.FEES_MANAGER_V2_INITIAL_REBATE_BUDGET: <USDC native units (6 decimals); size to expected first-day rebate-paying notional * 50 ppm>
preconditions: FEES_MANAGER_V2_REBATE_FUNDING_ACCOUNT holds >= initial budget in CollateralVault.balances(account, USDC)
governance has signed off the budget envelope and alert thresholds

backendEnvUpdate.OPTION_EVENT_INDEXER_FEES_MANAGER_V2_ADD: <deployed FeesManagerV2 address; set after Phase 1 and before Phase 7>
operatorSteps: Confirm /admin/fees/onchain reconciles V1 history without double counting

rollbackPlan.guardian: MarginEngine guardian may pauseTrading() to halt all option trades if owner key unreachable
doNotDoList: Do not delete backend event ledger rows

remainingBlockersAfterV2D_I: FEES_MANAGER_V2_FEE_RECIPIENT operator-supplied (must differ from InsuranceFund and MarginEngine)
FEES_MANAGER_V2_REBATE_FUNDING_ACCOUNT operator-supplied (may equal treasury since unused at launch)
decidedByV2D_I: INITIAL_OWNER = deployer EOA 0xc35F7A8A103A9A4464adfaa76B9B514093D23C27, then transferOwnership to ProtocolTimelock 0xa67f8e8e...3b588 before Phase 7
Initial USDC rebate budget = 0; negative-maker tiers unreachable
Tiny test trade = positive-fee only (Tier0 maker + Tier0 taker)
Phases 1, 2, 3, 7, 8 are separate operator actions; never combined
Perp wiring deferred until WireFeesManagerV2Perp.s.sol ships
